title: Jobs & Drop-offs
subtitle: Tools, labor, and where work goes

tutorial.title: Jobs & Storage Tutorial
tutorial.subtitle: Assign one worker and connect storage

objectives.label: Assign a citizen to a job
substeps: Choose an unlocked job from the list.
The citizen becomes pinned to that job until you release them back to Auto.

objectives.label: Give the worker a required tool
substeps: Open the same citizen's Job tab.
Use the tool slot if the job asks for a tool.
You can also use worker-type tool storage once a storage block is marked.

objectives.label: Mark a drop-off storage
substeps: Click the drop-off/storage row in the Job tab.
Right-click a chest, basket, barrel, or stockpile inside the settlement.
The Job tab reopens so you can continue configuring the worker.

objectives.label: Set preferred storage from Labor
substeps: Open the Town Hall Labor tab.
Right-click a storage block to make it the default depot for unlocked worker types.

pages.text: Citizens can gather in anarchy, but governments let you order specific jobs. Many ordered jobs need marked work areas, storage choices, or tools.
The Foreman's Rod is the bridge between menus and the world. Use it to choose work types, mark areas, and bind some jobs to places.

Pinned tutorials can track job assignment, tool setting, drop-off marking, seed storage, tool storage, and preferred storage. Use the pin in the Chronicle header when you want the checklist on the side tracker.
